1765650.name: WORLD OF ART - learn with JIGSAW PUZZLES: JIGSTRIS
1765650.description:
🧩 JIGSTRIS – The Ultimate Fusion of Jigsaw & Tetris!
SIMPLE | FUN | RELAXING | ADDICTIVE

Step into a brand-new puzzle experience with JIGSTRIS, the exciting new DLC for World of Art – Jigsaw Puzzles!
This unique twist combines the classic satisfaction of jigsaw puzzles with the fast-paced strategy of Tetris-style gameplay.

Perfect for fans of puzzle games, brain teasers, and fine art!

🎮 HOW IT WORKS:

  • Art puzzle pieces fall from the top – like Tetris blocks!

  • Rotate, fit, and place pieces in the correct spot before the board fills up.

  • Complete stunning artworks from around the globe in a relaxing yet challenging format.

Whether you're a casual puzzler or a seasoned strategist, JIGSTRIS offers the best of both worlds:

  • Easy to learn mechanics

  • Engaging gameplay loops

  • A beautiful gallery of hand-selected fine art from renowned artists and cultures

  • Designed for stress-free play, but with plenty of depth

🎨 FEATURES:

✅ Combines jigsaw puzzle and Tetris gameplay
✅ Features classic and modern fine art from the World of Art collection
✅ Play at your own pace – no timers, no pressure
✅ Great for relaxation, brain training, and casual gaming
✅ Family-friendly and perfect for all ages
✅ Supports mouse, keyboard, and controller input

Whether you have 5 minutes or 50, JIGSTRIS is your new go-to puzzle game mode. Unwind, challenge yourself, and immerse in the world of visual masterpieces.

Add this innovative DLC to your puzzle collection today and discover a whole new way to play!
World of Art: JIGSTRIS – Art Meets Arcade.

Enjoy!
1765650.supported_languages:
英语*, 波兰语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
